detectors.description:
Balerion.sendETHToFee(uint256) (Balerion.sol#753-759) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.mul(4).div(10)) (Balerion.sol#755)
	- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.mul(6).div(10)) (Balerion.sol#757)
detectors.markdown:
[Balerion.sendETHToFee(uint256)](Balerion.sol#L753-L759) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- [_teamAddress.transfer(amount.mul(4).div(10))](Balerion.sol#L755)
	- [_marketingFunds.transfer(amount.mul(6).div(10))](Balerion.sol#L757)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Balerion.openTrading() (Balerion.sol#763-811):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (Balerion.sol#775-777)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Balerion.sol#779-793)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Balerion.sol#779-793)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (Balerion.sol#801)
	Balerion.tradingOpen (Balerion.sol#365) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Balerion.openTrading() (Balerion.sol#763-811)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [Balerion.openTrading()](Balerion.sol#L763-L811):
	External calls:
	- [uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH())](Balerion.sol#L775-L777)
	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](Balerion.sol#L779-L793)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](Balerion.sol#L779-L793)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [tradingOpen = true](Balerion.sol#L801)
	[Balerion.tradingOpen](Balerion.sol#L365) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Balerion.openTrading()](Balerion.sol#L763-L811)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Balerion._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Balerion.sol#619-721):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Balerion.sol#693)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Balerion.sol#735-747)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Balerion.sol#699)
		- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.mul(4).div(10)) (Balerion.sol#755)
		- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.mul(6).div(10)) (Balerion.sol#757)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Balerion.sol#719)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Balerion.sol#927)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Balerion.sol#907)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Balerion.sol#909)
	Balerion._rOwned (Balerion.sol#329) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Balerion._takeTeam(uint256) (Balerion.sol#921-929)
	- Balerion._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Balerion.sol#881-917)
	- Balerion.balanceOf(address) (Balerion.sol#445-449)
	- Balerion.constructor(address,address) (Balerion.sol#391-409)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Balerion.sol#719)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Balerion.sol#935)
	Balerion._rTotal (Balerion.sol#341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Balerion._getCurrentSupply() (Balerion.sol#1077-1087)
	- Balerion._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Balerion.sol#933-939)
	- Balerion.constructor(address,address) (Balerion.sol#391-409)
	- Balerion.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Balerion.sol#549-571)

detectors.description: Balerion.openTrading() (Balerion.sol#763-811) ignores return value by IERC20(uniswapV2Pair).approve(address(uniswapV2Router),type()(uint256).max) (Balerion.sol#803-809)

	- Ownable.owner() (Balerion.sol#211-215) (function)

Balerion.allowance(address,address).owner (Balerion.sol#471) shadows:
	- Ownable.owner() (Balerion.sol#211-215) (function)

		- _owner = msgSender (Balerion.sol#203)

		- _teamAddress = addr1 (Balerion.sol#393)

		- _marketingFunds = addr2 (Balerion.sol#395)
